hero.sub: We provide a wide spectrum of materials and build strategic partnerships. We support you in adopting advanced materials and manufacturing processes.

solution.heading: WHY AZCOMPOSITE
solution.quote1: We understand that navigating today's composites market is time-consuming and process-intensive for companies. In day-to-day operations, there is rarely room to search for more efficient materials or test new innovations.
solution.quote2: At AZComposite, we break down these barriers. We are a modern supplier that brings solutions to simplify manufacturing and ensures a smooth path to implementation. We pride ourselves on a wide range of products, strategic partnerships, technical support, and an individual approach.

innovation.heading: DEVELOPMENT & INNOVATION
innovation.subheading: We don't just rely on datasheet values — we test and develop the materials in our portfolio.

items.title: First-Hand Data
items.body: We offer fabrics with precisely mapped properties. We conduct our own tests and microscopic crack analysis compared to competitors, so you always know exactly what you are buying.

items.title: Active Core Technology
items.body: We develop "active core" solutions for manufacturing complex prepreg parts without the need for an autoclave.

items.title: Innovation Integration
items.body: We work on implementing innovative solutions from our partners SOARCE and Nawah for advanced composite applications.

portfolio.heading: PORTFOLIO
portfolio.subheading: Complete range for composite manufacturing — from reinforcement materials to surface treatments.
portfolio.quote: Innovation is the foundation of our approach. What we cannot find in our wide supplier network, we are ready to <gradient>develop from scratch</gradient> with you. Share your vision and <gradient>let's make it happen!</gradient>

items.title: Reinforcement Materials
items.body: Carbon, glass, aramid, flax and hemp fabrics and mats for visual and structural applications.

items.title: Prepregs
items.body: Aerospace-grade systems — from fast-cure and structural to special tooling prepregs for mold manufacturing.

items.title: Resins
items.body: Premium polyester and vinyl ester systems (including sustainable options) and epoxies manufactured in the Czech Republic, fully customizable.

items.title: Sandwich Materials
items.body: High-performance flexible cores, PVC and PMI foams for maximum flexural stiffness.

items.title: Process Materials
items.body: Complete range for vacuum infusion — films, breather fabrics, flow media — reliably covering the entire manufacturing process.

items.title: Chemistry & Surfaces
items.body: Two-component structural adhesives, mold release agents and premium Pai Cristal polishing systems. Eco-friendly RST-5 cleaning as a 100% non-toxic acetone alternative.

items.title: Fastening Systems
items.body: Specialized Specialinsert anchoring elements for mechanical installation or direct lamination integration.

contact.heading: CONTACT
contact.subheading: Have a question or interested in collaboration? Write to us.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Your complete partner for composite manufacturing

cookie_banner.title: Cookie Consent Settings
cookie_banner.text: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our website and to analyze traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to their use.
cookie_banner.essential_desc: Required for core website functioning and language routing.
cookie_banner.analytical_desc: Help us measure website traffic and improve site structure.
cookie_banner.marketing_desc: Used for personalization and targeting relevant advertisements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At AZComposite, we take your privacy seriously. This policy describes how we collect, process, and protect the information you provide to us through this website.
privacy.section1_text: The data controller is Ing. Filip Klier, ID: 23048255, with registered office at Jankovcova 1587/8, Holešovice, 170 00 Prague 7, Czech Republic.
privacy.section2_text: We process data that you send us via the contact form (name, email, phone, company name, and message content) and anonymous traffic data collected via cookies.
privacy.section3_text: We process your data solely to respond to your inquiries, process requests, or for analytical evaluation of our website traffic based on your consent.
privacy.section4_text: You have the right to request access to your personal data, its rectification, erasure, or restriction of processing. You can send your requests to: filip.klier@azcomposite.com.

how_we_work.heading: HOW WE WORK
how_we_work.subheading: We ensure a seamless process from technical specification to delivery directly to your facility.

steps.title: 1. Consultation & Specification
steps.description: We analyze your technical requirements and recommend the optimal fiber weights, resin systems, and process materials suited precisely for your manufacturing process.

steps.title: 2. Sourcing & Samples
steps.description: Leveraging our extensive global supplier network, we source even non-standard materials. We also offer free samples so you can run real-world tests in your production.

steps.title: 3. Agile Delivery & Support
steps.description: We guarantee reliable logistics across Europe. We maintain strategic warehouse stock to meet JIT (Just-In-Time) schedules and provide continuous technical support.

portfolio_details.message_inquiry: Hello, I am interested in more information and a quote for: {category}.
portfolio_details.message_spoj: Hello, I am interested in a quote and samples for fastening systems (Specialinsert).

vyztuzne.subtitle: Structural and Cosmetic Reinforcements
vyztuzne.intro: Complete range of reinforcing fabrics for lamination and infusion processes, providing superior strength and premium aesthetics.

specs.label: Materials
specs.value: Carbon, Glass, Aramid (Kevlar), Flax, Hemp

specs.label: Weaves
specs.value: Twill, Plain, Satin, Unidirectional (UD)

specs.label: Grammages
specs.value: 80 to 650 g/m²

specs.label: Roll Widths
specs.value: Standard 100 cm, 125 cm, 150 cm (custom slitting available)

highlights: In-house mechanical testing and microscopic crack analysis
Excellent resin wet-out and minimal porosity
Eco-friendly natural fibers (flax, hemp) with outstanding vibration dampening

pryskyrice.subtitle: Lamination and Infusion Resin Systems
pryskyrice.intro: High-performance resins engineered for various manufacturing temperatures and application techniques.

specs.label: Types
specs.value: Epoxy, Vinylester, Polyester resins, eco-friendly Bio-resins

specs.label: Processes
specs.value: Hand lay-up, vacuum infusion, RTM, casting

specs.label: Thermal Limit
specs.value: From room cure up to Tg exceeding 150 °C

specs.label: Pot Life
specs.value: Adjustable (from 15 minutes to several hours)

highlights: Fully customizable systems formulated locally in the Czech Republic
Low viscosity for rapid impregnation without air entrapment
High UV resistance and mechanical strength

sendvic.subtitle: Lightweight Cores for Maximum Stiffness
sendvic.intro: Advanced sandwich core materials to reduce structural weight while maintaining high bending stiffness.

specs.label: Core Types
specs.value: PVC foams, PMI foams, Balsa wood, Honeycombs

specs.label: Densities
specs.value: 40 to 200 kg/m³

specs.label: Thicknesses
specs.value: 3 mm to 50 mm

specs.label: Finishing
specs.value: Grooved, perforated, grid-backed for resin optimization

highlights: Superior shear strength and exceptional fatigue resistance
Compatible with all standard epoxy and polyester systems

techmat.subtitle: Process Consumables for Vacuum Bagging
techmat.intro: Complete range of auxiliary materials for vacuum bagging, infusion, and prepreg processing.

specs.label: Product Range
specs.value: Vacuum bagging films, peel plies, breathers/bleeders, release films

specs.label: Sealant Tapes
specs.value: Tack-tapes rated for temperatures from 120 °C to 230 °C

specs.label: Widths
specs.value: Up to 300 cm for large-scale composite parts

highlights: High elongation and tear resistance under full vacuum
Temperature-stable materials suitable for oven and autoclave cures
Ensures consistent resin flow and clean, residue-free release

chemie.subtitle: Adhesives, Polishing, and Mold Release
chemie.intro: Professional auxiliary chemical products for perfect surface finish, easy demolding, and high-strength bonding.

specs.label: Polishing
specs.value: Premium Pai Cristal (PaiBoat) compounds and buffing pads for marine and industrial gelcoats

specs.label: Cleaning
specs.value: Water-based RST-5 – 100% non-toxic, biodegradable acetone replacement

specs.label: Release
specs.value: Semi-permanent release systems and waxes for multiple releases

specs.label: Adhesives
specs.value: Structural 2-component epoxy and polyurethane adhesives

highlights: RST-5 ecological cleaning is non-flammable, odorless, and fully safe for operations
Pai Cristal polishing systems guarantee scratch-free mirror gloss
High chemical durability of release agents reduces cycle times and extends mold life

spoj.subtitle: Fastening Solutions and Threaded Inserts
spoj.intro: Specialized fasteners designed for integration during lamination or post-cure assembly in composite and sandwich panels.

specs.label: Brand
specs.value: Specialinsert (certified fastening systems)

specs.label: Types
specs.value: Threaded inserts for co-curing, bonding inserts, rivet nuts

specs.label: Materials
specs.value: Stainless steel (A2/A4), zinc-plated steel, brass

highlights: High resistance to pull-out and torque-out in composite laminates
Co-cured studs and collar nuts integrate directly into the laminate structure
Professional solutions eliminating mechanical weakening caused by drilling
